differentials.name: Quick response to antibiotic treatment will leave no scars
differentials.raw: Quick response to antibiotic treatment will leave no scars

differentials.name: Delayed treatment of acute pyelonephritis during first 3 years of life can severely affect renal function later in life → decreased renal function, hypertension
differentials.raw: Delayed treatment of acute pyelonephritis during first 3 years of life can severely affect renal function later in life → decreased renal function, hypertension (33%), end-stage renal disease (10%)

differentials.name: Renal abscess
differentials.raw: Renal abscess (near-water density lesion without enhancement)

differentials.name: Scarring of affected renal lobes often in children + in up to 43% in adults
differentials.raw: Scarring of affected renal lobes often in children + in up to 43% in adults

differentials.name: May be associated with:   emphysematous cystitis
differentials.raw: May be associated with:   emphysematous cystitis (rare)

differentials.name: features of acute severe pyelonephritis (chills, fever, flank pain, lethargy, confusion) not responding to Rx
differentials.raw: features of acute severe pyelonephritis (chills, fever, flank pain, lethargy, confusion) not responding to Rx

differentials.name: positive blood + urine cultures (in majority), urosepsis, shock
differentials.raw: positive blood + urine cultures (in majority), urosepsis, shock

differentials.name: fever of unknown origin + NO localizing signs in 18%
differentials.raw: fever of unknown origin + NO localizing signs in 18%

differentials.name: multiple associated medical problems: uncontrolled hyperglycemia, acidosis, dehydration, electrolyte imbalance
differentials.raw: multiple associated medical problems: uncontrolled hyperglycemia, acidosis, dehydration, electrolyte imbalance

differentials.name: Kidney may be completely obscured by large amount of gas in perinephric space
differentials.raw: Kidney may be completely obscured by large amount of gas in perinephric space (DDx: surrounding bowel gas)

differentials.name: Gas may be confused with renal calculi
differentials.raw: Gas may be confused with renal calculi

differentials.name: elevated ESR; reversible elevated liver function tests (50%) ← inflammation of portal triads ◊  Symptomatic for 6 months prior to diagnosis in 40%!
differentials.raw: elevated ESR; reversible elevated liver function tests (50%) ← inflammation of portal triads ◊  Symptomatic for 6 months prior to diagnosis in 40%!

differentials.name: DIFFUSE XGP (83-90%) =  massive renal enlargement, lithiasis, peripelvic fibrosis, hydronephrosis, lobulated masses replacing parenchyma
differentials.raw: DIFFUSE XGP (83-90%) =  massive renal enlargement, lithiasis, peripelvic fibrosis, hydronephrosis, lobulated masses replacing parenchyma

differentials.name: SEGMENTAL / FOCAL XGP (10-17%) =  tumefactive form ← obstructed single infundibulum / one moiety of duplex system
differentials.raw: SEGMENTAL / FOCAL XGP (10-17%) =  tumefactive form ← obstructed single infundibulum / one moiety of duplex system

context: =  episodic bacterial infection of kidney with acute inflammation, usually involving pyelocaliceal lining + renal parenchyma centrifugally along medullary rays Risk factors: Pathway of infection: (a)  ascending bacterial infection ← (usually) P-fimbriated E. coli (fimbriae facilitate adherence to mucosal surface): initial colonization of ureter in areas of turbulent flow → paralysis of ureteral smooth muscle → dilatation + functional obstruction of collecting system (b)  vesicoureteral reflux + pyelotubular backflow: P-fimbriated E. coli NOT necessary for infection (c)  hematogenous spread (12
